title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 302.454 - Use of device shall be required, when
text:
302.454.  Use of device shall be required, when. — The court shall require the use of a certified ignition interlock device during the period of probation if the person is permitted to operate a motor vehicle, whether the privilege to operate a motor vehicle is restricted or not, as determined by the court.
(L. 1995 S.B. 102 § 3, A.L. 2014 S.B. 491) 
Transferred 2014; formerly 577.604; Effective 1-01-17
